title: Management and workforce relations
summary: 9609 AS — trade unions, collective bargaining, and industrial relations.
learningObjectives: Evaluate strategies for good industrial relations.

simpleExplanation.title: Employer meets employee representatives
simpleExplanation.summary: Workforce relations cover how management negotiates with unions and employee bodies over pay, conditions, and change.

sections.content: **Workforce relations** (2.1.7) completes **2.1 HRM**. Reference **union presence** in case context.
